title: 2026-06-21-business-deploy-task-main-flow-closeout
goal: Close canonical business error semantics and task-state behavior for the business/deploy task main flow in pantheon-ops without widening into package/template CRUD cleanup or base-sync work.

in: align deploy task create, update, delete, start, detail, cancel and task-host result semantics to business.deploy.task.* keys
close draft-state, delete-state and task-level package/template lookup behavior
sync deploy module i18n, design docs and smoke assertions for task-flow changes
ship the deploy-related frontend actions and detail/list UX needed by the new task behavior
out: deploy package or template CRUD legacy-key cleanup outside task entry points
pantheon-base shared-path fixes or foundation release upgrades
repo-wide frontend type-check cleanup for unrelated dirty-tree drift

implementationNotes: Landing side stays in pantheon-ops because the behavior is confined to business/deploy task flow and its business docs/locales/smoke coverage.
Task-flow canonicalization intentionally keeps defensive mapping branches for legacy package/template errors without widening CRUD semantics in this batch.

runtimeEvidence: GitHub pull_request workflows for quality and security gates
deploy api smoke spec and deploy page smoke assertions in repository
local runtime gap note for missing clean full-repo frontend/backend baseline

evidenceRequired: frontend i18n and menu contract outputs
runtime gap statement for local smoke/render coverage
